hotel_name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng De' TuVa Mũi Né (De' TuVa resort Mui Ne)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Biển nhiều rắc, không thuộc resort, phòng ngủ bị dòm ngó, nước bé bơi trước phòng thì vàng, không có người xử lý, phòng dơ, không đáng tiền

reviews.title: NEGATIVE EXPERIENCE WITH HOTEL
reviews.text:
- When arriving at the hotel, there were no staff to assist with parking.
- Check-in is at 2 PM, but even at 3 PM, we still had to wait over 30 minutes. When we finally went to check in, the equipment in the room was broken (the projector - even after staff came down to help, it still didn't work). Changing rooms with a sea view was exhausting.
Specifically, in room D303, the air conditioning was not cooling, and after waiting over 30 minutes, it was very hot. I called for assistance, but they said to wait. It was very hot, so I requested an additional standing fan to cool down, and this was quite shocking. There were power outages 3 times during the stay, which was very disappointing.
- The cleaning was not thorough; the floor was still slippery, especially the mattress which had sand on it.
- For the breakfast buffet, you had to select dishes - in general, I found the food unsuitable for my taste - very few dishes available.
- When I called the staff, they only apologized repeatedly.
- I WILL NOT RETURN HERE AGAIN; the 2,300,000₫ spent is not worth it for such a frustrating experience.

reviews.title: Nice concept but not go anywhere.
reviews.text:
The resort concept was quite interesting. But it investments was not good enough so…Lousy staffs. Not very location. 
So generally. It’s good-to know. If not…you’ll not miss anything.

reviews.title: Not coming back
reviews.text: I had high expectations for this place and was extremely disappointed by the poor layout of the room, although very big the room was poorly design and not very functional. The private pool is shared with another room, which on the day I stayed was occupied by kids screaming and careless parents. The beach is also very dirty and impossible to swim due to lack of safety measures and big waves. Morning buffet was poor and lack of choices. I will not come back.

reviews.title: Done
reviews.text: Done

reviews.title: Ok for Instagram
reviews.text: The resort looks very instagrammable. It’s nice, but rather small and the room was smaller than expected too. We had a massage at the in-house spa and it was a very strange experience. My masseuse came 10 minutes late with no explanation or apology, and showed up in pajamas. There was barely any customer service at the spa, the massage techniques were rather poor and the massage facility seemed rather unprofessional. There’s direct beach access, but the surrounding beach was surrounded by trash which didn’t make it swimmable for us. Breakfast was alright. Staff are friendly but not exactly helpful. Don’t expect anything exceptional. Price point is mainly for its picturesque-ness - unless the whole reason you’re there is to gloat to your followers that you’re at a “resort”, I wouldn’t recommend it

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Overall it's a no. The swimming pool water was slightly milky, not the usual clear blue. The bathtub was huge, enough to fit in 3 people, but it was damn dirty. The bathtub drainage was yellowish mold, I had to clean it myself. To make thing worst, they seem to run out of hot water when the tub is only 1/4 full.  The 1 good thing is the big projector screen in the room, lying on the bed watching soccer, nothing better than that.

reviews.title: just okay
reviews.text: nth fancy but okay in overall but the price is a bit pricey compared to the value we receive

reviews.title: Will not come back.
reviews.text: The bathroom was dirty, the drinking glass in the room was dirty. The drinking glass at breakfast was dirty. The room was small, with no tables or chairs to sit on. There was a terrible sewage smell coming from the toilet, water overflowing around the toilet bowl, the bowl was black, and there were dirty plants around it. The bathtub was also slimy. I don't wear makeup, so I didn't need a makeup table (the room doesn't have a table, but there is a large mirror in the room) and there was no storage cabinet. The bathroom's exhaust fan and air conditioner were very loud all night. The pool was dark, and no one cleaned it. I noticed that a child's toy had fallen into the pool from the afternoon before, and it was still there the next morning. Even though the pool isn't large at all. The breakfast had few options. Despite the high room rate, it didn't seem worth the price. Right at the door of the room, there was a wet rag blocking the way, and I couldn't figure out where the water was coming from. The hotel was fully booked, so I couldn't change to another room, I just had to endure it.

reviews.title: Bad Hygiene
reviews.text: Overall new hotel, but facilities were old/ second hand used. Water in the bathroom smells really bad, it smells like dung and dirt and definitely not clean water. Our room was on the 2nd floor so we were able to see the water process area it was not clean. Breakfast was ok however there were flies around the food. Considering the price you could book a 4-5star room with just around $10 more with much better quality. Not recommended.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Bãi biển toàn rác thải, phòng ốc cũ, nước tắm có mùi, được view biển hoàng hôn rất đẹp nếu book phòng view biển

reviews.title: Bồn cầu màu đen
reviews.text: Bồn cầu màu đen nhìn bị dơ và khăn tắm màu nâu nhìn ko sạch lắm.

reviews.title: Chưa đáng tiền 1tr8
reviews.text: Thiết kế đẹp theo phong cách Địa Trung Hải nhưng vệ sinh kém, chưa sạch, ăn sáng không đa dạng, bình thường. Khuôn viên nhỏ, hồ bơi cạn, không bơi được. Khu vực reception để check in ko bật quạt mặc dù open space. Tuy nhiên nhân viên nhiệt tình. Giá quá cao so với chất lượng

reviews.title: Hợp chụp hình nhưng cần cải thiện nhiều
reviews.text:
Điểm cộng là vị trí ko quá xa, nhân viên nhiệt tình,phòng có tặng trái cây. Decor trong và ngoài khá ok và mát.
Điểm trừ: Biển chỉ ngắm thôi chứ ko tắm dc, hồ bơi nhỏ phù hợp trẻ em hoặc sống ảo. Phòng khá rộng và đủ tiện nghi. Nhưng toilet hay có mùi, nước bồn tắm yếu và mùi. Buffet sáng ít món ko đa dạng. 
Với chất lượng này thì giá phòng hơi cao

reviews.title: Beautiful resort, friendly and professional staff. Temporary cleanliness.
reviews.text:
The resort is generally quite good.
Pros:
- The design of the premises and rooms is very beautiful; you can take photos from any angle.
- The staff is friendly, attentive, and professional. They pick up trash to keep the beach clean, which is very commendable.
- The breakfast buffet has many dishes, most of which are delicious; I was very satisfied with the breakfast buffet during my 2-day stay.
Cons:
- The premises are a bit small, so the pathways are narrow.
- I didn’t find any beach umbrellas in the room for guests to use when going to the beach or walking around the premises.
- The biggest downside was that the room I stayed in, which had a sea view, had a sewage smell, and I had to use essential oils and keep the exhaust fan on all night. Considering the price, this was quite disappointing during my recent vacation. Additionally, the projector in my room also had a broken speaker.

reviews.title: Overrated!
reviews.text: Beautiful decor, but poor hygiene. The cups in the room are very dirty. The breakfast is not good. The only thing decent is the warm pool. For the same price, you can find better services than what this place offers, don't be fooled by appearances.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I think this is just a 3-star hotel, not as complete as a resort; there aren't many options for breakfast and everything is only at a decent level.

reviews.title: Equipment in the room
reviews.text:
Public Wi-Fi is unavailable, so the phone cannot connect securely.  
Weak water pressure and no hot water in the rooms near the beach.  
Breakfast is served slowly even though the order was placed in advance.  
Staff are cheerful and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Bad experience
reviews.text: The breakfast options are limited and bad. This is the worst resort in the 1.8 - 2.5 million segment in PT that I have ever stayed at. The welcome fruit was green bananas and green apples ???? The door mechanism to lock from the outside requires a key card, but it can be easily forced open. The view from the deluxe pool view rooms overlooks a metal roof :)) On the bright side, the security is enthusiastic, but the reception staff varies in friendliness. The bathtub has stains. Overall, the worst in its price range for me. I will not return.

reviews.title: About 3/5 stars is fine.
reviews.text: The view is quite beautiful; however, the quality of the room is only about 3 stars, with no TV, no vanity table, and no work desk. There are mosquitoes and a strong smell from the sewer.

reviews.title: Stable
reviews.text:
Breakfast: change the main dish every day. The taste is acceptable.
Room quality: the mattress and pillows are acceptable, the water system was weak for 2 days but was fixed, the key broke 2 times and the staff had to be called.
Staff: except for the manager or leader, the staff have not been trained to service standards; one employee came to fix the key while chewing on a toothpick talking to a guest.
Booked a Deluxe pool view room; when looking at the pictures, there was one showing a view of the pool from the ground, but on the day of arrival it was found that the resort had changed the photo and the room was on the upper floor, so I'm not sure which room I'm in even though I paid extra compared to the run of the house.
Location: okay if you are used to moving around in Ho Chi Minh City, about 19 km from Phan Thiet center, takes about 25 minutes.

reviews.title: Overall, it's disappointing.
reviews.text: Credit cards cannot be used, and foreign currency exchange is not available. Can you tell me the locations of ATMs and currency exchange offices? Payment is only accepted in Vietnamese Dong. Caution is needed. Despite the hotel’s atmosphere, the breakfast is very meager. It's newly built and feels nice, but I felt that the staff's response does not match it at all. I didn't feel the charm to come back. It's disappointing.

reviews.title: New resort in town
reviews.text: Kinda good but not really the review. Nice staff and good food

reviews.title: worth experiencing
reviews.text:
Pros: Clean rooms, beautiful view. The staff is very enthusiastic and attentive. If you come here to take photos, remember to bring many outfits, every angle is beautiful, and the photos won't repeat any concept hehe.  
Cons: The projector and speakers in the room are very poor, given the price, I expected better :)) The breakfast was also quite average and not tasty to me, I stayed for 3 days and 2 nights and noticed that the food didn't change much on the menu (only 1-2 dishes changed).

reviews.title: not worth the money
reviews.text: The experience is not worth the money, the room costs 2.6 million but the breakfast has few options, the room is damp because the pool overflowed into it and I had to ask the staff to come and clean it 3-4 times. The toilet is extremely smelly due to the sewage smell rising up, even though there are essential oils, it can still be smelled again. Looking at what I received compared to the price of the room, other places would have better service and cleanliness.

reviews.title: Một nơi đáng để lựa chọn
reviews.text: Khách sạn rất đẹp, view phải nói là tuyệt với đó. Tuy nhiên nếu có thể nên đầu tư để thuê người dọn khu vực bãi tắm của khách sạn…, có lẽ bãi tắm chung nên hơi nhiều nilon rác thải. Bên cạnh đó khách sạn nên cân nhắc thêm 1 số dịch vụ : ví dụ chưa có giặt là ( có lẽ trước đó thì có nhưng vì 1 lí do nào đó nên bỏ), các dịch vụ liên kết như book tour đi đảo hay các tour dịch vụ kèm theo đó…. Nhưng nói chung chúng tôi đã có trải nghiệm rất tuyệt tại đây, nhấn mạnh về sự đẹp của khách sạn, nhân viên thì rất x3 thân thiện và nhiệt tình, hỗ trợ gần như 24/7 …. Great!!!

reviews.title: Stable and okay
reviews.text: The room is clean, and there's a projector to alleviate boredom. The staff is cheerful and dedicated. The breakfast buffet was a bit boring, but everything else is fine and quite okay. I might consider booking again.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: Nice projector, audio issues, lovely room

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The room design is very beautiful, creative, and fully equipped. However, there needs to be a review of the landscaping design and the quality of the staff at RST, which is very inconsistent.

reviews.title: Terrible beach
reviews.text: Everything else was fantastic, location something you should expect in the center of the Vietnam town.

reviews.title: Unique Place
reviews.text: De’Tuva Resort is a lovely small resort in a great location. The staff are very friendly and welcoming, the breakfast is tasty, and the atmosphere is peaceful and relaxing. A unique place to unwind in Mũi Né!

reviews.title: Pretty good stay, but price is somewhat not worth it
reviews.text:
Here are some highlights:
	•	Location: Conveniently close to the beach, Suoi Tien Mui Ne, and several other resorts.
	•	Staff: Friendly and supportive. I noticed they clean the seashore in the mornings (though there’s still quite a lot of trash washed up from the sea).
	•	Facilities: The bathroom is huge. They also provide a projector and a Netflix account, which is a nice touch.

On the downside:
	•	Cleanliness: There was a sewage smell in the bathroom, and the staff didn’t clear out leftovers left by previous guests in the hallway.
	•	Breakfast: Very basic and honestly fell short of my expectations.
	•	Swimming pool: There were still many small rocks (apparently from its structure), which was quite inconvenient.

Overall: A decent place to stay, but I’d recommend it only if the price is more reasonable.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Phòng: thiếu bộ bàn ghế nho nhỏ để ăn nhẹ, thiếu bàn trang điểm.
Hồ bơi: quá tuyệt vời.
Sảnh ăn: hơi nhỏ và lấn chỗ sang khu vực sảnh trước phòng ở, chỗ đó nên để riêng tư cho mỗi phòng nếu có nhu cầu ăn trk phòng.
Bãi biển: cần được cải tạo lại để du khách có thể xuống bơi.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Holiday trip with family
reviews.text: All the staff are very nice. The room is spacious and beautiful, but if the toilet bowl were switched to white, everything would be perfect. The black bowl doesn't give a very confident feeling. Everything else is well-organized.

reviews.title: the experience was very okay
reviews.text: I stayed for 2 nights and 1 day and enjoyed a lot, especially the staff here are very enthusiastic and friendly.

reviews.title: Acceptable at a 3-star level.
reviews.text: The decor is beautiful with many photo spots for young people, good support staff, new furniture, but the black toilet bowl is a bit dirty, and the buffet has a limited selection. It's suitable for young people who love taking photos. Easy-going people will be fine here.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: The newly built resort is very clean. The room doesn't have a TV, but there is a large projector screen that shows very clear images. When checking in, the staff should guide the guests. Because at first, I didn't know how to use the remote to control the projector. I also suggest that the room should have double single beds for families. The staff is very enthusiastic and super cute. I will come back when I have another opportunity.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Đường đi khá khó khăn do đang mùa sửa chữa, nên tôi chưa dám đến lại lần 2

reviews.title: Beautiful place
reviews.text:
Gorgeous place, room with a view to the beach and very clean.
But, the staff lacked professional courtesy, breakfast is until 10AM, by 9:40 the staff already starts to pack the food, the cutlery and play very loud music so you can’t even enjoy the remaining food you have on your plate, the bar staff were great but other than that needs some improvements

reviews.title: Highly Recommend
reviews.text: Phòng ở, decor khách sạn rất đẹp và sạch sẽ. Điểm trừ duy nhất là bãi biển sau khách sạn khá bẩn và nằm cạnh 1 con mương nhiều rác, ko tắm được

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The buffet food was mediocre. The dishes were not washed properly. The staff is very, very nice and extremely attentive. The view is beautiful, perfect for taking pictures, especially during sunset with the deluxe premium room D304.

reviews.title: Great place, staffs. Breakfast variety needs a bit improvement
reviews.text:
Overall a great place, staffs were extremely helpful and friendly, they supported me to ask the disturbing next door party to stop at midnight.

The breakfast variety do need to improve so we can have more selection.

reviews.title: Couple relaxing weekend
reviews.text: The resort is suitable for couples and small families to relax on weekends. Comfortable interior, friendly staff, beautiful beach, stylish swimming pool.

reviews.title: Beautiful space
reviews.text: Beautiful space located on a nice coastal line. Staff are friendly and helpful. The room is decent and clean.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel space is okay, clean, and beautiful. The staff are very enthusiastic, a perfect 10 without any buts. There are a few areas that need improvement: the breakfast has quite few options and only changes 1 or 2 dishes each day. The toilet spray nozzle has very weak water pressure.

reviews.title: Nice experiences
reviews.text: I had 1 night at De’Tuva and it was incredible. The room was great, clean and the staff was super adorable. One thing to improve is the key card to access to the room. Sometimes it took me several times scanning it. Other than that, I strongly recommended. 😭😭😭

reviews.title: Trải nghiệm ngày 22-23/06/2025
reviews.text:
- Trước khi đặt phòng mình đã nhắn qua zalo với bên resort để báo là tụi mình đi 3 người và cần giữ giường phụ. Bên resort oke và báo mình có thể thanh toán tiền phụ thu khi check in chứ không bắt cọc trước để giữ giường phụ này. Nhưng khi đến nơi thì lại nhận tin là không có giường vì không ai note lại phòng mình, bên lễ tân báo sẽ thu 300.000vnd thay vì 500.000 cho tiền ăn sáng. Mình đồng ý vì dù gì cũng tới rồi và bên lễ tân có nói là giường lớn 3 tụi mình nhỏ người có thể nằm đủ. Khi lên phòng thì trong phòng mình chỉ set up tất cả cho 2ng, bên lễ tân cũng không mang thêm chăn gối, bộ kit lên cho tụi mình dù ở quầy các bạn đã biết bên mình đi 3ng và đã thu đủ tiền. Mình phải nhắn bên zalo thì mới đem xuống. Và giường ngủ tụi mình cũng nằm chật, không ngủ thoải mái. Đây là 1 phần trải nghiệm mình chưa hài lòng.
- Về staff và các nhân viên các bạn nhiệt tình, hỗ trợ. 
- Điểm cộng là đồ ăn sáng các món ăn đều hợp khẩu vị chứ không chỉ tập trung vào 1 món như 1 vài resort mình từng trải nghiệm. 
- Cơ sở vật chất còn mới và sạch sẽ.

reviews.title: The hotel is more modest than I expected.
reviews.text: The hotel is very clean, the staff is friendly, the breakfast is also good, but the path to the beach has quite a bit of trash.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: At Mandala, there are 2 types of accommodation: hotel and rental apartments. This room I booked is a hotel. The services are great (spa, swimming pool, breakfast buffet, electric car), and the staff are friendly and enthusiastic. It's far from the center and there's not much to do around, but since I had researched in advance, I decided to explore around the hotel grounds and the Mandala beach, so everything is just fine.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great view, fancy. The food is also okay, the sea view is not as good as the pool. Suitable for rekindling old flames^^. Will come back.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
new room, clean 
accurate description 
breakfast is à la carte. 
there's Netflix but it's not working, hope the resort will fix it. 
suggest that the resort take better care of customers who arrive by motorbike. Customers traveling by motorbike will feel quite tired, sometimes they might fall asleep and not notice the rain, hope the resort can assist customers by allowing them to store helmets or providing a small locker at the reception for helmets.

reviews.title: Best stay ever
reviews.text: Upon arrival, we were greeted by the staff and since it was blazing hot, their staff came with umbrellas to shelter us from the sun. Then they proceeded to help us with all our luggage and had good service. It was a great time being there.

reviews.title: Amazing experience
reviews.text: My family has 2 kids who took a break during the holiday, everything is peaceful, delicious food, beautiful scenery, and not crowded.

reviews.title: Very satisfied.
reviews.text: I don't understand why there are so many negative reviews when my family found everything to be great, from the staff to the rooms and the decoration style. We will definitely come back in the near future.

reviews.title: Tet holiday stay
reviews.text:
- i had a very pleasant and relaxed stay at the resort.
The room is spacious and very well-designed, decorated.
Projector is a great device to have
The only thing id like to comment is breakfast has limited options for food and drinks. The rest are excellent

reviews.title: Family trip
reviews.text: Good time and enjoy

reviews.title: Family trip
reviews.text: Good time we enjoyed

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: nice place, nice location. Conclusion everything is very good

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Nice resort
reviews.text: I like this resort with bathtub inside. My children like it and have funs in the bathtub & swimming pool.

reviews.title: Beautiful Memories
reviews.text: All around excellent stay, facilities, spa, and room!

reviews.title: Ideal travel destination.
reviews.text: I must say that the staff here are very nice. They are friendly and serve quickly. The resort is fragrant and clean, an ideal place for relaxation.

reviews.title: A place for couples
reviews.text: Beautiful scenery, clean rooms, enthusiastic staff. The only downside is that breakfast is not diverse and tasty. The menu needs to be improved to include more variety and better flavors. Additional items like needles and thread should be provided. Overall, satisfied.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: Really worth the price to have a view just beside the seas and having 2 nice pools and garden.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I stayed for 3 days and 2 nights. The beautiful girls and handsome guys here, from the reception, restaurant, spa, security, to the cleaning staff, are all very lovely, enthusiastic, and friendly - 10 out of 10. The room is nice, the pool is beautiful, but the beach has a lot of trash, so I just strolled and enjoyed the scenery without swimming in the sea.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Clean and beautiful accommodation with many photo spots, fully equipped rooms. Breakfast is limited but has a beautiful view.

reviews.title: Giá thành đi đôi với chất lượng
reviews.text: Từ các bạn lễ tân cho tới chú bảo vệ mọi người đều dth nhiệt tình. Ăn sáng đa dạng món ngon. 10đ không có nhưng

reviews.title: Beach getaway 👍
reviews.text:
The location is fantastic, making it easy to explore the area, while the cleanliness and spacious rooms enhance the overall comfort. Housekeeping does a great job in maintaining the standards. Facilities are top-notch, providing everything needed for a pleasant stay. However, shopping options nearby could be improved, but that didn't detract from the
overall experience. Highly recommend for a great getaway!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff was very attentive from check-in to check-out, the room was beautiful and clean, but the bathtub drainage was clogged.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Super beautiful resort, friendly and enthusiastic staff. Worth the price.

reviews.title: Nice!
reviews.text:
Everything was great. But our room had a private pool in front of the door but there was no sign indicating that it was a pool so other guests came to our room to use the bathroom as well as the view from our room, everything was fixed when I contacted the staff and asked them to make a warning sign about privacy. Another bad thing was that the washing machine broke down during our stay, so we had to use an outside service.
Overall, the breakfast, service attitude as well as the attentiveness of the resort all made me satisfied and would come back if I had the chance.

reviews.title: 10 points
reviews.text: The room we stayed in had a minor issue, but the hotel handled it and resolved it professionally. The room is spacious and clean. Beautiful.

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: A very beautiful hotel, the hotel staff are very attentive, the food is delicious; the room is a perfect 10; the space is very beautiful, a place worth coming to relax and enjoy.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is very beautiful, and the staff take great care of the guests; I am very satisfied and will definitely come back if I have the chance.

reviews.title: Khách sạn đẹp, nhân viên nhiệt tình
reviews.text: Nhân viên lễ tân rất nhiệt tình và dễ thương.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Everything is very okay, I like the style of the resort. All experiences are satisfying. Getting lost on the way back is real...

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The accommodation is very beautiful, the staff is nice, and the beach for swimming is not very appealing. Having dinner at the resort is both convenient and delicious.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Có dịp sẽ quay lại vì còn nhiều góc đẹp mình chưa chụp lại hết. Buffet sáng rất ngon và view chill lắm

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: good services

reviews.title: Reasonable relaxation
reviews.text:
- The room is spacious, clean, well-equipped, with a projector, suitable for those who want to change their sleeping place without going out to explore. The bathroom is huge, and taking a bath is wonderful.
- The staff is enthusiastic and friendly, greeting guests upon arrival and carrying bags for them.
- The swimming pool is okay, nicely decorated for photos, but not large in design.
- There is a sewage stream flowing into the resort's beach section, so I hesitated to go there.
- Breakfast items: The noodle strands were hard and dry, the omelet was delicious, the beef stew was tasty, the cassava cake and steamed cake were good, while the other dishes were average. 10 points for the lady frying eggs who interacted with guests cheerfully and enthusiastically.
- A small suggestion is that the resort should update information regarding the retention of guests' ID cards, as nowadays everywhere takes a photo of them. It would be reasonable to offer a cold towel upon welcome in the hot weather of Phan Thiết.
=> Overall quality matches the price. I will come back.

reviews.title: Resort travel
reviews.text: The new room is clean and beautiful, with a striking Mediterranean architecture and a luxurious color tone.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: All the staff are enthusiastic and friendly.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The resort space is cool, and all rooms have beautiful views. The staff is friendly, eager to help, and attentive, providing quick service during the check-in and check-out process. If I get the chance, I will definitely come back!

reviews.title: Spot for content
reviews.text: Beautiful designed hotel - a dream for anyone who appreciates aesthetics. The place is especially popular among young people for creating content and taking photos. The breakfast offers something for everyone. The beach area is a bit small and doesn’t have sun loungers, but the resort itself offers plenty of swimming options and lots of places to relax. The room could perhaps use an extra table or seating option, depending on your needs. Also nice for vacations nights with groups if you want to watch movies as the rooms have a projector.

reviews.title: Oke stay
reviews.text: The room was nice, as well as the pool and the view at sea. We sometimes got a smoking smell in the room via the airconditioning. Western options for breakfast was very minimal so we went out for that. The location is quite far from the center, so renting a scooter is the best option. You find these around the corner. The reception is easy to reach via WhatsApp, but are not really willing to assist you or help you order a taxi, suggest a scooter rental place etc.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Mình nghĩ sẽ không quay lại chỗ này. 
Đầu tiên là cách cư xử của nhân viên lễ tân, hầu hết các bạn khá dễ thương trừ 1 bạn nữ(mình không thấy bảng tên). Nhóm mình bao gồm mình và chị gái có thai, mình đã note trong app là đặt phòng tầng trệt vì chị mình sợ vỡ ối khi leo cầu thang. 
Thứ nhất, sau khi mình xuống trao đổi, xin hỗ trợ đổi 1 phòng xuống tầng trệt bạn nhân viên chỉ nói là do mình nhận phòng trễ nên hạng phòng mình đã hết tầng trệt (nói chung là đổ thừa do khách nhận trễ). 
Thứ hai, mình hỏi tại sao mình đặt trên app đã ghi chú rõ là lấy tầng trệt thì sao không chuẩn bị, bạn trả lời : Do chị đặt qua app chứ không phải qua bên em nên phần này bên em không biết. 
Thứ 3, resort không đưa ra hướng gợi ý giải quyết, khách chỉ có thể chấp nhận với sắp xếp đó. Mình sẵn sàng bỏ thêm tiền để nâng hạng phòng để có phòng tầng trệt nếu bạn nhân viên hỗ trợ gợi ý, nhưng thái độ bạn như kiểu mình đang làm phiền bạn vậy đó. 

Tiếp theo là đến không gian. Phòng khá nhỏ, ở thì đủ nhưng không có tủ quần áo, vali phải để trên sàn. Bồn tắm và vòi nước có mùi cống rất hôi, quạt thông gió trên bồn cầu có rất nhiều chuột- mình đi vệ sinh mà cứ sợ chuột nó vật nhau rơi xuống đầu mình.

Sau đó là đồ ăn, buffet sáng rất ít món, quầy line khá nhỏ. Mình chỉ ăn bánh mì nên không nói được mấy món khác như nào, nhưng chị mình nói dở :)

Sau đó là bãi biển, một cái bãi biển toàn rác và không thể tắm được vì quá dơ. Từ nhánh cây đến chai nhựa và bọc ni long. Chỉ có thể tắm hồ bơi, điểm cộng là hồ bơi nhìn khá chill.

Cuối cùng là vị trí, resort nằm ở cái đoạn khá xa so với tp. phan thiết và mũi né. Và đặc biệt là đường đi vào khá xấu và nhỏ, mình nhận thấy có nhiều đoạn đang sửa cống. Đường có đoạn ổ gà to như 1 cái bánh xe, xe to vào là phải chen chúc nhau xe trước xe sau mới vào được.

Thôi nói chung giá **** mà trải nghiệm như này mình sẽ không quay lại, vì thấy phí tiền mà còn chẳng vui.

Nvien phục vụ buffe sáng thì ko sử dụng muỗng riêng để thử đồ ăn mà húp thẳng từ muỗng nấu rồi nhúng lại vào nồi nước lèo, 7h sáng xuống ăn sáng nhưng vẫn chưa set up xong. reviews.title: Good 3 star hotel
reviews.text: We stayed here for 5 nights. Rooms are really nice and clean. Beds are comfortable. Only thing is, that the pool needs more maintenance. Water is not that clear and there is some algae on the kids side.  Staff are great and polite. Massage in the hotel is very good, and affortable. No need to go for a massage outside the hotel.

reviews.title: Will come back again
reviews.text:
The architecture has a charming Mediterranean style with arched windows and wooden balconies, perfectly blending with the palm trees and ocean view. Rooms are clean and comfortable, and you can fall asleep to the sound of the waves.

The pool area is stunning – palm trees, arched walls, and rustic décor make it feel like a magazine cover. I also loved the seaside walkway with bamboo ceilings and the restaurant right by the pool, where dining feels so relaxing.

If you’re looking for a place that combines nature, style, and a true holiday vibe, this hotel is absolutely worth it.
